nodes.name: Fetch Pending PROPOSED Items

parameters.query: SELECT id, register_name, proposed_data, confidence_label, proposed_at FROM confidence_gate_log WHERE status = 'PROPOSED' ORDER BY CASE confidence_label WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 3 END, proposed_at DESC LIMIT 25;

nodes.notes: Sorted by confidence: HIGH items first (most likely correct, fastest to review).

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PROPOSED') AS pending, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED' AND reviewed_at::date = CURRENT_DATE) AS confirmed_today, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'REJECTED' AND reviewed_at::date = CURRENT_DATE) AS rejected_today FROM confidence_gate_log;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS runs, SUM(items_proposed) AS total_proposed FROM extraction_run WHERE started_at::date = CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'completed';

meta.description: GET /webhook/evening-review — returns pending PROPOSED items sorted by confidence (HIGH first), gate stats, and extraction run summary. This is Fabian's primary review touchpoint where he confirms/rejects items.
